name: Chicken & Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the chicken with salt and pepper to taste.
2. Place the seasoned chicken in the crockpot.
3. Mix equal parts white wine and cream of mushroom soup.
4. Pour the wine-soup mixture over the chicken.
5. Add the mushrooms on top of the chicken.
6. Cook on low for 7-9 hours or on high for 3-4 hours.
7. Sliced onions may be added for a different flavor.
